sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103961" key="timai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῑμαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">highly prized</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0443.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope> </bibl>:—mostly as pr. n. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τίμαιος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
